# Isabel Simon Counseling

> Isabel Simon is an Associate Professional Clinical Counselor (APCC #15186) offering in-person therapy in Redondo Beach and the South Bay beach cities, plus telehealth throughout California. She specializes in anxiety, depression, life transitions, and adolescent/young adult therapy.

## About Isabel

Isabel Simon is a clinical mental health counselor based in Redondo Beach, California. She holds an Associate Professional Clinical Counselor license (APCC #15186) and is supervised by Elaine Quintilliani, LMFT #136794. Isabel has a background in art history and clinical mental health counseling, and comes from a family of female mental health professionals. Her approach is warm, grounded, and infused with appropriate humor.

## Services

- **Individual Counseling**: One-on-one therapy sessions, available in-person (South Bay) and via telehealth (California-wide)
- **Virtual Therapy / Telehealth**: HIPAA-compliant video sessions available to anyone in California
- **Group Therapy**: Coming soon — small themed group sessions

## Specialties

- Anxiety
- Depression
- Life transitions
- Adolescents and young adults
- Eating disorders (PHP/IOP experience)
- Self-esteem
- Stress management

## Therapeutic Approaches

- Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
- Mindfulness-based therapy
- Strengths-based therapy
- Narrative therapy
- Trauma-informed care

## Location & Service Area

- **In-person**: Redondo Beach, Hermosa Beach, Manhattan Beach, Torrance, Palos Verdes, El Segundo, San Pedro, and surrounding South Bay communities
- **Telehealth**: Available throughout California

## Contact

- Phone: (323) 391-6783 (call or text)
- Email: isabelsimoncounseling@gmail.com
- Instagram: @isabel_simon_counseling
- Website: https://www.isabelsimoncounseling.com
- Free 15-minute consultation available
